title: Scrambled Eggs
recipe: Beat eggs, melt butter in a pan and cook until creamy.

title: Cheese Omelette
recipe: Mix eggs with grated cheese and fry.

title: Tomato Omelette
recipe: Add chopped tomato to beaten eggs and fry.

title: Ham and Cheese Toast
recipe: Place ham and cheese between bread slices and toast.

title: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
recipe: Butter bread, add cheese and grill.

title: Pancakes
recipe: Mix ingredients and fry thin pancakes.

title: French Toast
recipe: Dip bread in egg mixture and fry.

title: Caprese Salad
recipe: Slice ingredients and arrange on a plate.

title: Greek Salad
recipe: Combine vegetables and cheese.

title: Chicken Salad
recipe: Mix cooked chicken with vegetables.

title: Chicken Wrap
recipe: Wrap chicken and vegetables in tortilla.

title: Chicken Rice Bowl
recipe: Serve grilled chicken over rice.

title: Fried Rice
recipe: Stir fry rice and egg together.

title: Vegetable Stir Fry
recipe: Cook vegetables in a hot pan.

title: Broccoli Soup
recipe: Boil broccoli and blend with milk.

title: Potato Soup
recipe: Cook potatoes and onions until soft.

title: Mashed Potatoes
recipe: Mash cooked potatoes with butter and milk.

title: Baked Potatoes
recipe: Bake potatoes until crispy.

title: Fruit Salad
recipe: Cut fruit and mix.

title: Banana Smoothie
recipe: Blend banana with milk.

title: Apple Yogurt Bowl
recipe: Mix diced apple with yogurt.

title: Berry Yogurt
recipe: Mix berries into yogurt.

title: Tuna Salad

title: Vegetable Pasta
